title: smilax zeylanica
intro: Smilax zeylanica, also known as Indian sarsaparilla or sarsaparilla, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Smilacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Smilax zeylanica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
